# EZ Form Builder - User Dashboard

A professional Next.js form builder dashboard with light/dark theme support.

## Features
- Professional dashboard UI inspired by modern form builders
- Light/dark theme toggle with persistent preferences
- Responsive design with proper mobile support
- TypeScript for better development experience
- Tailwind CSS for consistent styling

## Tech Stack
- Next.js 14 (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- React Context for theme management
- Lucide React for icons

## Project Structure
- Professional form builder dashboard
- Theme toggle functionality
- Responsive layout components
- Dashboard metrics and analytics
- Form management interface

## Development Setup
Use npm or yarn for package management and follow Next.js best practices.
